summary: AC #1 fully met. Backend: _resolve_user_name() correctly resolves first_name+last_name or username fallback. joinedload(TicketDepot.benevole_user) added to list_tickets and get_ticket with .unique() — no N+1. Schema extended with benevole_user_name field (from_attributes=True). Frontend: fallback chain benevole_user_name ?? benevole_user_id.slice(0,8) ?? dash is correct. 4 tests added (2 frontend: name display + null fallback, 2 backend: list + detail). Conftest enriched with first_name/last_name. No security issues, no regressions. Minor note: create/close endpoints return benevole_user_name=null (out of scope, non-blocking).
